questionHtml: The radius of the pulley is 2.5 cm. Calculate the angular speed of rotation of the pulley as the load hits the floor. State your answer to an appropriate number of significant figures.
markschemeHtml:
use of ω=vr to give 84 «rad s−1»

OR

ω=2.1/0.025 to give 84 «rad s−1» ✓

 

quoted to 2sf only✓
